Package mru.game.controller

Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
mru.game.controller.GameManager
public class GameManager extends Object
This method sets the file path for the CasinoInfo file, as well as the player list and app menu.
Author:
Xavier Yick, Kaydence Eng

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    (package private) AppMenu
    appMenu
    initializes the app menu
    private final String
    FILE_PATH
    sets the file path to set location
    (package private) ArrayList<Player>
    players
    initializes the player list

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameManager()
    This constructor initializes the players, appMenu, loads the data, and launches the application

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    findTopPlayer()
    This method prints the top player, and will print up to three if they are tied
    private void
    launchApplication()
    This method will call the startMenu method and break off into three different choices depending on the user's input
    private void
    loadData()
    This method finds the CasinoInfo file and will create one if it does not exist, and will load the information from the file
    private void
    playGame()
    This method will ask the user for a name, and will either return the user's information or will create a new user account if it does not exist.
    void
    save()
    This method saves the current game info to the CasinoInfo file using the format method
    private void
    search()
    This method will call the searchMenu method and break off into three different choices depending on the user's input
    private Player
    searchByName(String name)
    This method searches for a username given by the user (used for game)
    private void
    searchByNameMenu(String name)
    This method searches for a username given by the user (used for menu)
    private Player
    searchByNameNew(String name)
    This method creates a new player with the user's given username

  • Constructor Details

    • GameManager

      public GameManager() throws Exception
      This constructor initializes the players, appMenu, loads the data, and launches the application
      Throws:
      Exception

  • Method Details

    • launchApplication

      private void launchApplication() throws Exception
      This method will call the startMenu method and break off into three different choices depending on the user's input
      Throws:
      Exception

    • playGame

      private void playGame()
      This method will ask the user for a name, and will either return the user's information or will create a new user account if it does not exist. Then it will initialize the game

    • search

      private void search()
      This method will call the searchMenu method and break off into three different choices depending on the user's input

    • findTopPlayer

      private void findTopPlayer()
      This method prints the top player, and will print up to three if they are tied

    • searchByName

      private Player searchByName(String name)
      This method searches for a username given by the user (used for game)
      Parameters:
      name - is the user's given username
      Returns:
      the player and info

    • searchByNameNew

      private Player searchByNameNew(String name)
      This method creates a new player with the user's given username
      Parameters:
      name - is the user's given username
      Returns:
      the new player and base info

    • searchByNameMenu

      private void searchByNameMenu(String name)
      This method searches for a username given by the user (used for menu)
      Parameters:
      name - is the user's given username

    • save

      public void save() throws Exception
      This method saves the current game info to the CasinoInfo file using the format method
      Throws:
      Exception

    • loadData

      private void loadData() throws Exception
      This method finds the CasinoInfo file and will create one if it does not exist, and will load the information from the file
      Throws:
      Exception
